title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q3 2023 Earnings Report Preview
text: Marvell Technology is forecast to report revenue of $2.07 billion, representing 36.5% year-over-year growth. The networking chips company is also expected to deliver adjusted earnings per share of $0.74. The company met analysts' revenue expectations last quarter, reporting revenues of $2.01 billion, up 57.6% year on year. Guidance for the subsequent quarter disappointed Wall Street expectations. Marvell has a strong history of beating estimates, having only missed Wall Street's revenue estimates once over the last two years, exceeding top-line expectations by 1.2% on average. The semiconductor sector faces headwinds from tariff concerns and tax uncertainties affecting 2025 performance. MRVL shares are down 2.3% over the past month, trading at $88.22 compared to analysts' average price target of $91.73. Comparable companies showed mixed results, with Teradyne gaining 19.8% after beating expectations, while broader semiconductor stocks have underperformed, averaging a 5% decline over the past month.
